summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. Polygon CEO 宣布因 Coinme 收購而裁員，顯示行業整合壓力。
2. 比特幣價格因美國股市拋售下跌，微米損失超過 30%。
3. 摩根士丹利在 E*Trade 上推出比特幣、以太坊和索拉納交易，顯示傳統金融機構對加密的參與增強。
4. BitPay 獲得荷蘭 MiCA 授權，計劃擴展穩定幣支付，顯示穩定幣市場的增長潛力。
5. Citadel Securities 投資 4 億美元於 Crypto.com，將交易所估值提升至 200 億美元，顯示市場信心回升。

## 📊 市場概況
今日加密貨幣市場整體表現偏弱，比特幣（BTC）報價64025美元，24小時內下跌1.18%。以太坊（ETH）報價1874.92美元，下跌2.31%。其他主流幣如索拉納（SOL）和幣安幣（BNB）也出現小幅回調，顯示整體市場情緒受到美股波動影響，投資者情緒相對謹慎。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
比特幣和以太坊的RSI指標分別為50.25和58.9，均顯示出短期內的多頭趨勢，但市場仍需注意潛在的回調壓力。索拉納和BNB的RSI指標則分別顯示為47.53和46.03，顯示出空頭的壓力。總體而言，市場技術指標呈現混合信號，需謹慎觀察後市走向。

## 😱 市場情緒
恐懼貪婪指數目前為25，顯示市場處於「極度恐懼」的狀態，這通常預示著市場的短期低迷和潛在的投資機會。社群情緒普遍謹慎，投資者對市場前景持觀望態度，可能會影響未來的資金流入。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
市場波動性加大，特別是在美股拋售的背景下，加密貨幣價格可能面臨進一步回調風險。投資者需謹慎管理風險，避免在市場不穩定時進行重倉操作。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
今日需關注比特幣和以太坊的支撐位及反彈情況，特別是在市場情緒低迷的背景下，任何技術反轉的信號均可能影響市場走向。此外，摩根士丹利推出的加密交易服務的反響及其對市場的影響也是值得關注的焦點。

news.title: Polygon CEO announces job cuts amid Coinme acquisition
news.summary: The round of layoffs was part of Polygon transitioning operations to payments following a $250 million deal to acquire Coinme and Sequence in January.
news.title_zh: Polygon CEO 宣布因 Coinme 收購而裁員
news.summary_zh: Polygon 的 CEO 宣布將裁減部分員工，原因與 Coinme 的收購有關，顯示出公司正在調整其業務策略。

news.title: Leaks Reveal Suno Fed Thousands of Hours of Deezer, YouTube and Pond5 Data Into Its AI
news.summary: Source code leaked reveals how substantial portions of Suno’s training library were assembled.
news.title_zh: 洩漏消息顯示 Suno 將數千小時 Deezer、YouTube 和 Pond5 數據輸入其 AI
news.summary_zh: 有消息指出，Suno 將大量音樂和視頻數據輸入其人工智慧系統，可能影響內容創作和版權問題。

news.title: Trump teleprompter operator made $100K betting on Kalshi markets tied to speeches: ABC
news.summary: According to ABC News, federal regulators are investigating whether the longtime White House staffer used nonpublic information to profit from event contracts tied to President
news.title_zh: 特朗普的提詞器操作員在與演講相關的 Kalshi 市場上賺取 10 萬美元：ABC
news.summary_zh: 特朗普的提詞器操作員利用 Kalshi 市場進行賭注，成功獲利 10 萬美元，顯示市場的潛在機會。

news.title: Bitcoin outlook improves amid 6% weekly gain: Can BTC bulls push higher?
news.summary: Bitcoin buyers have returned to spot, futures and ETF markets but geopolitical headwinds could quickly unravel the progress of the past two weeks.
news.title_zh: 比特幣前景改善，週增 6%：BTC 牛市能否推高？
news.summary_zh: 比特幣在過去一週上漲 6%，市場對其未來表現持樂觀態度，投資者期待牛市的持續。

news.title: 1inch co-founder says he was fired, announces new venture
news.summary: Anton Bukov said that he no longer took an active role at 1inch and had been “fired” in 2025 after pushing for changes to the company’s management and operations.
news.title_zh: 1inch 聯合創始人表示自己被解雇，宣布新創業計劃
news.summary_zh: 1inch 的聯合創始人透露自己被公司解雇，並計劃啟動新的創業項目，顯示其不屈的創業精神。

news.title: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
news.summary: Eligible customers can now buy, sell, and hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana with Morgan Stanley via Zero Hash.
news.title_zh: 摩根士丹利在 E*Trade 上推出比特幣、以太坊和索拉納交易
news.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利宣布在 E*Trade 平台上提供比特幣、以太坊和索拉納的交易服務，擴大其金融產品範圍。

news.title: MegaETH sunsets Mega Mafia accelerator program, noting ‘most’ of its successful apps left
news.summary: MegaETH did not take equity or governance positions in the approximately 20 projects incubated in the Mega Mafia.
news.title_zh: MegaETH 終止 Mega Mafia 加速器計劃，指出「大多數」成功應用已離開
news.summary_zh: MegaETH 宣布結束 Mega Mafia 加速器計劃，認為大多數成功的應用已經不再參與，反映市場變化。

news.title: Injective files for SEC transfer agent registration to bring securities ownership records onchain
news.summary: The company said the filing would create a regulated pathway for maintaining ownership records for tokenized securities onchain.
news.title_zh: Injective 向 SEC 申請轉讓代理註冊，將證券所有權記錄上鏈
news.summary_zh: Injective 正在向美國證券交易委員會申請註冊，以便將證券所有權記錄轉移到區塊鏈上，提升透明度。

news.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin outlook sees ‘encouraging sign’ as Strategy boosts cash reserves
news.summary: Strategy's larger cash reserves and improving institutional demand in bitcoin futures are "encouraging signs" for bitcoin, JPMorgan said.
news.title_zh: 摩根大通表示比特幣前景出現「鼓舞人心的跡象」，策略提升現金儲備

news.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
news.title_zh: 今天加密貨幣市場發生了什麼

news.title: ‘We’re going to get it done’: Crypto bill faces what could be final test over Trump conflicts of interest

news.summary_zh: 加密貨幣法案在特朗普的利益衝突問題上，可能面臨最後的挑戰。

news.title: BitPay secures Dutch licensing under MiCA, plans to expand stablecoin payments
news.summary: The Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets approved BitPay’s application as a crypto-asset service provider under the Markets in Crypto-Assets requirements.

news.title: Tether invests $20 million in Ualá as the fintech firm reaches $3.2 billion valuation
news.summary: Tether invested $20 million in Argentine neobank Ualá, joining a $197 million funding round that valued the fintech at $3.2 billion.
news.title_zh: Tether向Ualá投資2000萬美元，該金融科技公司估值達32億美元
news.summary_zh: Tether對Ualá的投資顯示出其在金融科技領域的信心，該公司估值已達32億美元。

news.title: Tokenized stocks market cap gains to record $2.3B
news.summary: The market capitalization of tokenized stocks rose to a record $2.3 billion, as investors sought exposure to the growing list of tokenized equity products launched by cryptocurrency exchanges.
news.title_zh: 代幣化股票市值增長至創紀錄的23億美元
news.summary_zh: 代幣化股票的市場市值達到23億美元，顯示出這一新興市場的快速增長潛力。

news.title: FATF urges faster crypto AML enforcement as stablecoin crime increases
news.summary: The global task force said criminal networks are using stablecoins and developing proprietary tokens to evade asset freezes as countries struggle to enforce crypto AML rules.
news.title_zh: FATF呼籲加快加密貨幣反洗錢執法，因穩定幣犯罪增加
news.summary_zh: 隨著穩定幣相關犯罪的增加，FATF要求各國加快對加密貨幣的反洗錢執法。

news.title: Morning Minute: Base Hands Its App Over to Cobie
news.summary: Plus, Stripe makes a $53 billion move that could crown a stablecoin king. And Ostium gets drained of $18M in the latest DeFi exploit.
news.title_zh: 早安分鐘：Base將其應用交給Cobie
news.summary_zh: Base將其應用程序的管理權交給Cobie，預示著新的發展方向和合作機會。

news.title: Galaxy targets institutional stablecoin yield with new DeFi vaults
news.title_zh: Galaxy 針對機構穩定幣收益推出新 DeFi 金庫
news.summary_zh: Galaxy 推出新 DeFi 金庫，旨在為機構投資者提供穩定幣的收益機會。

news.title: ARK pushes back against a16z’s ‘TradFi wants blockchain, not DeFi’ claim
news.summary: ARK Invest’s director of research disputed a16z crypto’s thesis that traditional finance will adopt permissioned blockchain infrastructure instead of decentralized finance, saying institutions will increasingly rely on De
news.title_zh: ARK 反駁 a16z 的「傳統金融想要區塊鏈，而非 DeFi」說法
news.summary_zh: ARK 對 a16z 的觀點提出質疑，強調 DeFi 的重要性和潛力。

news.title: The most popular bitcoin call option has slipped by $10,000
news.title_zh: 最受歡迎的比特幣看漲期權下滑了 $10,000
news.summary_zh: 比特幣看漲期權的價格出現大幅下滑，反映市場情緒變化。

news.title: Jeff Booth, Lyn Alden-backed ORANGE JUICE raises $40 million to launch permanent capital firm with bitcoin treasury strategy
news.summary: ORANGE JUICE raised $40 million to acquire businesses, pursue a bitcoin treasury strategy, and implement a permanent capital ownership model.
news.title_zh: Jeff Booth 和 Lyn Alden 支持的 ORANGE JUICE 籌集 4000 萬美元啟動永久資本公司，採用比特幣財庫策略
news.summary_zh: ORANGE JUICE 成功籌集資金，計劃以比特幣作為其資本運作的核心。

news.title: Inside the high-stakes race to build an open financial system specifically for AI bots
news.title_zh: 深入了解為 AI 機器人建立開放金融系統的高風險競賽
news.summary_zh: 多方競爭者正積極開發專為 AI 機器人設計的金融系統，競爭激烈。

news.title: Feds Arrest Florida Man Over Video Game Malware That Stole $220K in Crypto
news.summary: Zyaire Wilkins allegedly procured malware hidden in video games that infected 8,000 devices and broke into 80 crypto wallets, the FBI says.
news.title_zh: 聯邦調查局逮捕佛羅里達州男子，因其視頻遊戲惡意軟體竊取 22 萬美元加密貨幣
news.summary_zh: 一名男子因開發惡意軟體竊取加密貨幣而被聯邦調查局逮捕。

news.title: Bitcoin pulls back to $64,000 after hitting monthly high as bears take control
news.title_zh: 比特幣在觸及月度高點後回落至 64,000 美元，空頭掌控市場
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格回落，顯示空頭力量增強，市場情緒轉向謹慎。

news.title: Autonomous AI agent economy faces infrastructure gaps: Visa, Artemis
news.summary: Visa and Artemis found that infrastructure bottlenecks are preventing broader commercial adoption of the autonomous AI agent economy.
news.title_zh: 自主 AI 代理經濟面臨基礎設施缺口：Visa、Artemis
news.summary_zh: Visa 和 Artemis 指出，自主 AI 經濟的發展受限於基礎設施不足。

news.title: Tether invests $20 million in Argentine neobank Ualá as it expands Latin America push
news.title_zh: Tether 投資 2000 萬美元於阿根廷新銀行 Ualá，擴展拉丁美洲業務
news.summary_zh: Tether 加大對拉丁美洲市場的投入，支持 Ualá 的發展。

news.title: U.S. adds four Iran central bank crypto wallets to sanctions, Tether freezes $131 million of contents
news.title_zh: 美國將四個伊朗中央銀行加密錢包列入制裁，Tether 凍結 1.31 億美元資產
news.summary_zh: 美國對伊朗的制裁措施擴大，Tether 也隨之凍結相關資產。

news.title: Volvo Group tests proprietary cryptocurrency for supplier transactions in blockchain push
news.summary: Volvo Group's proprietary cryptocurrency project remains in the ideation stage and is not yet industrialized.
news.title_zh: 沃爾沃集團測試專有加密貨幣以進行供應商交易，推動區塊鏈應用
news.summary_zh: 沃爾沃集團正在測試其專有的加密貨幣，以促進供應商之間的交易，並推動區塊鏈技術的應用。

news.title: US Senate unanimously adopts resolution opposing clemency for SBF
news.summary: The Senate approved a resolution opposing clemency for former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried as prediction markets put the odds of a Trump pardon by July 31 below 1%.
news.title_zh: 美國參議院一致通過決議反對對SBF的寬恕
news.summary_zh: 美國參議院全體一致通過一項決議，反對對前FTX首席執行官山姆·班克曼-弗里德的寬恕。

news.title: Lummis, Gallego secure unanimous Senate approval opposing Sam Bankman-Fried clemency
news.summary: The U.S. Senate unanimously approved a resolution opposing a presidential pardon or commutation for convicted FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried.
news.title_zh: 拉米斯和加列戈獲得參議院一致批准，反對山姆·班克曼-弗里德的寬恕
news.summary_zh: 參議員拉米斯和加列戈成功獲得參議院一致支持，反對對山姆·班克曼-弗里德的寬恕提案。

news.title: US Senate Unanimously Opposes Sam Bankman-Fried Pardon
news.summary: The nonbinding resolution said the disgraced FTX founder should 'under no circumstances' receive clemency.
news.title_zh: 美國參議院一致反對山姆·班克曼-弗里德的赦免
news.summary_zh: 美國參議院全體一致表決反對對山姆·班克曼-弗里德的赦免，顯示出對其行為的強烈譴責。

news.title: Visa says stablecoins will power micro-commerce in AI agentic economy
news.summary: Visa said it expects agentic commerce to integrate a hybrid flow that combines both card and stablecoin rails at different stages of a task.
news.title_zh: Visa表示穩定幣將推動AI代理經濟中的微型商務
news.summary_zh: Visa預測，穩定幣將在人工智慧驅動的經濟中成為微型商務的主要推動力。

news.title: Tether invests $20M into Argentine neobank Ualá
news.summary: Tether reportedly invested $20 million into Ualá, as part of the Argentine neobank’s $197 million funding round announced earlier in March.
news.title_zh: 泰達向阿根廷新銀行Ualá投資2000萬美元
news.summary_zh: 泰達公司宣布向阿根廷新興銀行Ualá投資2000萬美元，以支持其業務發展。

news.title: Bitcoin $107K buyers providing ‘early signals’ of 2026 bear-market bottom: Glassnode
news.summary: Bitcoin realized losses appeared to be copying a reversal structure that marked previous bear-market bottoms, with $69,000 a new BTC price battleground.
news.title_zh: 比特幣107K買家提供2026年熊市底部的‘早期信號’：Glassnode
news.summary_zh: 數據分析公司Glassnode指出，比特幣107K的買家可能預示著2026年熊市的底部即將到來。

news.title: Robinhood Chain memecoin launchpad Vlad.fun halts after ‘internal integrity’ issue
news.summary: Vlad.fun suspended its platform after discovering a “serious internal integrity issue” involving members of its team, without disclosing the nature of the alleged misconduct.
news.title_zh: Robinhood Chain的memecoin發射平台Vlad.fun因‘內部完整性’問題暫停
news.summary_zh: Robinhood Chain的memecoin發射平台Vlad.fun因內部問題暫時停止運營，影響其用戶。

news.title: Hyperion DeFi to deploy 500K HYPE for Hyperliquid HIP-3 markets
news.summary: The deal gives Hyperion an equity stake in Skew and a share of listing-service revenue as it expands the utility of its HYPE treasury assets.
news.title_zh: Hyperion DeFi將為Hyperliquid HIP-3市場部署50萬HYPE
news.summary_zh: Hyperion DeFi計劃在Hyperliquid HIP-3市場中部署50萬HYPE，以擴大其市場影響力。

news.title: Live updates: Bitcoin holding $64,000 as AI momentum stocks continue to tumble
news.title_zh: 即時更新：比特幣持穩64000美元，AI動能股持續下跌
news.summary_zh: 比特幣目前穩定在64000美元附近，而與人工智慧相關的動能股票則持續下跌。

news.title: U.S. Senate unanimously opposes clemency for FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried
news.title_zh: 美國參議院一致反對對FTX創辦人山姆·班克曼-弗里德的赦免
news.summary_zh: 美國參議院全體成員一致表決反對對FTX創辦人山姆·班克曼-弗里德的赦免請求。

news.title: A bitcoin wallet dormant since the 2017 peak just moved $383 million
news.title_zh: 自2017年高峰以來沉寂的比特幣錢包剛剛轉移了3.83億美元
news.summary_zh: 一個自2017年以來未曾活躍的比特幣錢包最近進行了一筆3.83億美元的轉移。

news.title: Ether outruns bitcoin as ETF money returns, almost all of from BlackRock's fund
news.title_zh: 以太幣超越比特幣，ETF資金回流幾乎全來自黑石基金
news.summary_zh: 隨著ETF資金回流，以太幣的表現超過了比特幣，主要資金來自黑石的基金。

news.title: Trump to meet with senators over CLARITY Act on Thursday: Politico
news.summary: US President Donald Trump is set to meet with several senators on Thursday as negotiators race to get the CLARITY Act across the line before the Senate’s August recess.
news.title_zh: 特朗普將於週四與參議員會面討論CLARITY法案：政治報導
news.summary_zh: 特朗普計劃在週四與參議員會面，討論有關CLARITY法案的事宜。

news.title: Two groups of crypto investors are selling bitcoin to cap its latest price recovery
news.title_zh: 兩組加密貨幣投資者正在出售比特幣以限制其最新價格回升
news.summary_zh: 為了限制比特幣的價格回升，兩組加密貨幣投資者選擇出售其持有的比特幣。

news.title: Base’s social bet left it trailing in prediction markets and perps: Pollak
news.summary: Base creator Jesse Pollak is stepping back from leadership of the Base App after admitting he was “definitively wrong” to bet on social experiences driving crypto adoption.
news.title_zh: Base的社交賭注使其在預測市場和永續合約中落後：Pollak
news.summary_zh: 根據Pollak的報導，Base在預測市場和永續合約中因社交賭注而表現不佳。
